utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am telling you , if you want to take care of that thing , you should go to my herbal guy .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Thank you , but I want to remove it Pheebs . I do not want to make it savory .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You know when girls sleep with guys with weird things on their body , they tell their friends about it .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Gimme this .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hi ! Okay , do not be mad at me , but I could not resist .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Brides magazines ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yes , and I know that you would say no if he asked you , but I am sorry , how great would you look walking down the aisle in this Donna Carin ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , you so would ! Oh , you should get that anyway . Like for clubbing .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: It is so weird , I know what I said , but uh , this morning , I was lying in bed I was , I was imagining what it would be like to say yes .

emotion_cause.span: 9_this morning , I was lying in bed I was , I was imagining what it would be like to say yes .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I know it is a little sudden , and it is a little rushed , and it is totally not like me to do something like this , but that does not mean I can not .

emotion_cause.span: 12_I am ... I am crazy about Pete , and I know that we want the same things , and when I thought about saying yes

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Right ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I mean I am ... I am crazy about Pete , and I know that we want the same things , and when I thought about saying yes , it made me really happy .

emotion_cause.span: 12_I am ... I am crazy about Pete , and I know that we want the same things , and when I thought about saying yes

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh my God .

emotion_cause.span: 12_when I thought about saying yes , it made me really happy .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I know . I need more pie .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hey Mon umm , if you do get married , can I bring two guests ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You did not break up with that fireman ?

emotion_cause.span: 16_You did not break up with that fireman ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No , that was my way of telling you .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , it turns out he is incredibly sensitive , he keeps a journal and he paints .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: He even showed me charcoal drawings that he drew of me .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Wow !

emotion_cause.span: 19_He even showed me charcoal drawings that he drew of me .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , well he would prefer water colors , but you know , he has easy access to a lot of charcoal .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: So then , are you going to dump Jason ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , yeah , because I have to break up with someone , and ... Okay so Jason is sensitive , but now so Vince Plus , Vince has the body you know ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: So ... It is really just about the math .
